chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Generosity and Munificence

text: 1710 - وَ قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «مَنْ أَدَّى مَا اِفْتَرَضَ اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ فَهُوَ أَسْخَى اَلنَّاسِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1710 - The Prophet, peace be upon him and his family, said:
"Whoever fulfills what Allah (swt) has made obligatory upon him is the most generous of people."
